expectations.text: Output uses var(--color-text-muted) or var(--color-text-muted-light) for description text
expectations.evidence: Line 135: color: var(--color-text-muted) on .recipe-empty-description. Also references --color-text-muted-light in engine class comment.

expectations.text: Output uses glass surface tokens (var(--bg-glass) or var(--blur-glass))
expectations.evidence: Line 64: background: var(--bg-glass); line 65: backdrop-filter: var(--blur-glass)

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded muted colors (#666, #999, #aaa, color: #)
expectations.evidence: Zero hardcoded colors in the entire file — 100% var(--*) token usage

expectations.text: Output uses logical spacing (padding-block, padding-inline, margin-block)
With-skill agent discovers existing .c-empty-state or .c-glass-card engine class and composes from it instead of reinventing
expectations.evidence: Header comment documents discovered engine: .c-empty-state, .c-empty-state__icon, .c-empty-state__msg, .c-btn-primary — agent composed from these and only added component-level context on top

expectations.text: Output applies Five-Group Vertical Rhythm with clear group separation
expectations.evidence: Every selector has /* 1. Layout */ /* 2. Dimensions */ etc. group comments with blank line separation throughout
